expectations.text: event_analytics.info.yml contains core_version_requirement with BOTH ^10 AND ^11: '^10 || ^11' (NOT just '^10', NOT 'core: 8.x')
expectations.evidence: event_analytics.info.yml line 5: 'core_version_requirement: ^10 || ^11' — exact match of required format with both ^10 and ^11.

expectations.text: Dependencies listed in 'drupal:node' format (NOT bare 'node' without the drupal: prefix)
expectations.evidence: event_analytics.info.yml line 7: '  - drupal:node' — uses the required 'drupal:' prefix format.

None of the 3 PHP files (event_analytics.module, src/AttendanceTracker.php, src/Controller/EventAnalyticsController.php) contain declare(strict_types=1). All start with '<?php' followed by namespace or docblock without the strict_types declaration.

expectations.text: .module file only created if hooks are actually needed (NOT an empty .module file with no hooks)
expectations.evidence: event_analytics.module exists but contains only a docblock comment (lines 1-7) with no hook implementations — it is effectively an empty .module file with no hooks.

expectations.text: All PHP classes are in src/ directory following PSR-4 (NOT in the module root)
expectations.evidence: Both PHP classes are under src/: src/AttendanceTracker.php (Drupal\event_analytics namespace) and src/Controller/EventAnalyticsController.php (Drupal\event_analytics\Controller namespace). No PHP class files exist in the module root.

expectations.text: .info.yml has 'type: module' (required in D10+, was optional in D8)
The module enables successfully: ddev drush en event_analytics returns exit code 0
expectations.evidence: ddev drush en event_analytics -y returned '[notice] Already installed: event_analytics' with EXIT_CODE: 0

ddev drush pm:list --filter=event_analytics shows 'Event Analytics (event_analytics)' with Status 'Enabled' under Package 'Events'. The module is confirmed present and enabled in Drupal's module system.
